description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, floral printed yoke with green tape detailing, three-quarter sleeves with tape detailing along the cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The floral printed yoke adds zing to this kurta. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
